summary: Iteration 10: Stripe Connect, Payments, and Notification System testing complete. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (1 skipped due to no MAKE_OFFER listing). All Stripe routes, payment checkout validation, and notification CRUD working. Frontend: All UI components verified - notification bell with badge count, dropdown with recent notifications, mark-all-read button, Stripe Connected badge on profile, trade rating display, Buy Now/Make Offer buttons on listings, Make Offer modal.

seed_data_creation: Created test BUY_NOW listing for payment checkout testing. Created test TRADE listing for notification trigger testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe Connect and Notifications fully tested. Stripe Connect is SIMULATED - creates acct_sim_* IDs and immediately marks as connected on return URL visit. Checkout payments use emergentintegrations library with sk_test_emergent key which may fail actual Stripe session creation but validation works (cannot buy own listing, correct amounts, etc.). Notification types: NEW_FOLLOWER, POST_LIKED, NEW_COMMENT, TRADE_PROPOSED, TRADE_ACCEPTED, SALE_COMPLETED, PURCHASE_COMPLETED, STRIPE_CONNECTED. Platform fee is 4%.

features: POST /api/stripe/connect - creates simulated Express account, returns URL
GET /api/stripe/connect/return - marks user as stripe_connected, creates notification, redirects
stripe_connect.mock_details: Stripe account IDs are acct_sim_* format, no real Stripe API calls

features: POST /api/payments/checkout - creates checkout session for BUY_NOW listing
POST /api/payments/checkout - supports offer_amount for MAKE_OFFER listings
payments_checkout.mock_details: Uses emergentintegrations StripeCheckout with test key - session creation may fail but validation logic works

features: GET /api/payments/my-sales - returns seller's transaction history with totals

triggers: Follow user → NEW_FOLLOWER notification to followed user
Like post → POST_LIKED notification to post owner
Propose trade → TRADE_PROPOSED notification to listing owner
Accept trade → TRADE_ACCEPTED notification to initiator
Stripe connect return → STRIPE_CONNECTED notification to user

components: NotificationBell in Navbar with badge count
Dropdown with recent notifications, icons, timestamps
Mark all read button (shows when unread > 0)
Polling every 15 seconds for unread count
Stripe Connected badge (green with credit card icon)
Buy Now button with price for BUY_NOW listings
Make an Offer button for MAKE_OFFER listings
Propose Trade button for TRADE listings
Make Offer modal with amount input, 4% fee info, Pay button

mocked_apis_summary.stripe_connect: Simulated - no real Stripe Express onboarding
mocked_apis_summary.stripe_checkout: Uses emergentintegrations library with test key - may fail session creation
